command_desc.qwen: Generate professional AI images with Qwen 2.5 🦄
command_desc.gemini-analyze: Analyze and understand image content using AI 🔍

stt.help:
🎙️ *Audio to Text Conversion*

Please reply to an audio message with:
{prefix}stt
stt.downloading: ⏳ Downloading and transcribing audio... Please wait.
stt.no_audio: ❌ Please reply to an audio or voice message.
stt.error: ❌ Failed to transcribe audio. Try again later.

pdf2img.help:
*✨ ──────────────── ✨*
📄 *Convert PDF to Images* 📄

📌 *Reply to a PDF file with:*
{prefix}pdf2img
*✨ ──────────────── ✨*
pdf2img.not_pdf: ❌ Please select a PDF file only.
pdf2img.error_lib:
❌ *Local conversion library not installed!*

⚠️ Owner needs to run:
`npm install pdf-img-convert`

quran.enter_number:
❌ Please enter a Surah number or name.

📝 Example:
.quran 1  (Surah Al-Fatiha)
.quran 36 (Surah Yasin)
Or by name:
.quran Al-Fatiha
.quran alfatihah
quran.not_found:
❌ Surah not found with this name.

✅ You can use the number or name.
📝 Examples:
.quran 1
.quran Al-Fatiha
.quran alfatihah
.quran yasin
quran.invalid_number:
❌ Invalid Surah number.

Please enter a number between 1 and 114 only.
quran.fetch_error: ❌ Could not fetch Surah data from the server.
quran.hidden_ayahs: ⚠️ Remaining Ayahs are hidden to reduce message size.
quran.no_session: ❌ No active Surah session. Please request a Surah first (e.g., *.quran 33*)
quran.finished: ✅ You have finished reading the entire Surah!
quran.sending_audio: 🎧 Sending audio recitation of the Surah now if available.
quran.error: ❌ An error occurred while fetching the Surah. Try again later.

waterbot.help:
💧 *WaterBot - Artificial Intelligence* 💧

🔹 *Usage:*
{prefix}waterbot [your question]
{prefix}waterai [your question]

📝 *Example:*
{prefix}waterbot Explain black holes simply

💡 Fast and useful AI to answer your queries.
waterbot.error_generic:
❌ An error occurred while communicating with WaterBot.
⚠️ Reason: {error}

gpt.help:
🤖 *GPT-4.5 AI* 🤖

📝 *Usage:*
.gpt [your question]

💡 *Example:*
.gpt What is the capital of Morocco?
.gpt Write a poem about AI

sticker.usage: ❌ Please reply to an image/video with .sticker or send media with the command.

sticker.error_generic: ❌ Failed to create sticker! Try again later.

weather.not_found: ❌ Sorry, could not find weather info for "{city}".
weather.error: ❌ Error fetching weather info. Try again later.

tiktok.no_url: 📌 Please provide or reply to a TikTok video link.
tiktok.invalid_url: ⚠️ Invalid TikTok link. Please check the URL.
tiktok.download_failed: ❌ Failed to download video. Try another link.

instagram.usage:
📌 Usage: Send or reply to an Instagram post/reel link.
Example:
.ig https://instagram.com/reel/xxxx
instagram.no_media: ❌ No media found at the link.
instagram.caption: 〽️ Downloaded by *{botName}*

setlang.help:
🌐 *Language Settings / إعدادات اللغة*

Current Language / اللغة الحالية: {current}

Available Languages / اللغات المتاحة:
1️⃣ .setlang 1 or .setlang en (English)
2️⃣ .setlang 2 or .setlang ar (Arabic)
3️⃣ .setlang 3 or .setlang ma (Moroccan Darija)
setlang.unsupported: ❌ Unsupported language: {lang}. Use: en, ar, ma

translate.usage:
*TRANSLATOR*

Usage:
1. Reply to a message with: .translate <lang>
2. Or type: .translate <text> <lang>

Example:
.translate hello fr
.trt hello es

📋 Available Codes:
{available}
translate.no_text: ❌ No text found to translate. Please provide text or reply to a message.
translate.error:
❌ Failed to translate text. Try again later.

Usage:
1. Reply to a message with: .translate <lang>
2. Or type: .translate <text> <lang>

reactions.owner_only: ❌ This command is only for the Owner!
reactions.enabled:
✅ Smart auto-reactions enabled!

🎯 The system will react automatically to bot commands and normal messages.
reactions.status:
⚙️ Auto-reactions status: {status}

To use the command:
.areact on - Enable
.areact off - Disable

play.no_query:
⚠️ Please provide a song name.
📝 Example:

play.wait: ⏳ *Please wait, downloading your song... Stay tuned!* 🎧

group.mute_error: An error occurred while muting/unmuting the group. Please try again.

group.delete_error: I need to be an admin to delete messages.
group.clear_error: An error occurred while clearing messages.
group.close_admin_bot: ⚠️ Please make the bot an *admin* first.
group.close_admin_user: ❌ Only group admins can use the *close group* command.

🔒 The group has been *closed*.
Only admins can send messages now.
group.open_admin_bot: ⚠️ Please make the bot an *admin* first.
group.open_admin_user: ❌ Only group admins can use the *open group* command.

🔓 The group has been *opened*.
All members can send messages now.

group.ghosttag_group_only: ❌ This command is for groups only.

ai.veo3_help:
✨ *VEO3 Prompt Generator* ✨

🔹 *Usage:*
{prefix}veo3-prompt [Video idea description]

📝 *Example:*
{prefix}veo3-prompt create a video about Morocco sunset

💡 Generates professional prompts.

⚔️ {botName}

video_ai.usage: 📌 Please send or reply to a video with this command to enhance it.
video_ai.wait: ✅ Video received. Starting the upscale process...
video_ai.wait_processing: ⏳ Please wait, your video is being processed by the server.
video_ai.uploading: ⬆️ Video successfully uploaded. Starting conversion job...
video_ai.job_created: ⏳ Job created. Waiting for results... (Max 5 minutes)
video_ai.success: ✅ Job finished. Sending the upscaled video...
video_ai.error: ❌ An error occurred during video enhancement.

brat_vd.usage:
📌 Please send text after the command.
Example: .brat-vd Hello World
brat_vd.wait: ⏳ Creating your video... Please wait a moment.
brat_vd.error: ❌ An error occurred while creating the video.

ai_enhance.help:
❌ *AI Enhance - Usage Guide*

You must reply to an image to use this feature.

📌 *How to use:*
1. Send or receive an image
2. Reply to the image
3. Type one of the commands below

✨ *Available Commands*
• {prefix}ai-enhance → Enhance image quality
• {prefix}ai-enhance bg → Remove background
• {prefix}ai-enhance upscale → Upscale image to 4K

📝 *Example*
Reply to an image and type:
{prefix}ai-enhance

⚠️ Notes:
• Processing takes 5–15 seconds
ai_enhance.wait: ⏳ *AI is processing your image, please wait...*

moderation.ban_usage: ❌ Please mention the user or reply to their message to ban them from the bot!
moderation.ban_success: ✅ User @{user} has been banned from the bot!
moderation.unban_usage: ❌ Please mention the user or reply to their message to unban!
moderation.block_usage:
❌ *Usage:*

📝 *To block:* 
▪️ Reply to message: .block
▪️ Or type: .block [number]

💡 *Example:*
.block 212612345678

⚔️ {botName}
moderation.unblock_usage: ❌ Please mention user or type their number to unblock.
moderation.antilink_admin: ❌ This command is for admins only!
moderation.antilink_group_only: ❌ This command is for groups only!
moderation.antilink_success_desc:
⚙️ *Action:* {action}

💡 Action applies to anyone sending links (except admins).
moderation.antilink_status_body:
📌 *Current Status:* {status}

📝 *Commands:*
• .antilink on delete
• .antilink on kick
• .antilink on warn
• .antilink off

💡 *Note:* Bot must be admin.

Usage: Send a Facebook link.

book.help:
📚 *Book & PDF Search Tools* 📚

🔹 *Usage:* 
{prefix}book [Book Name]
{prefix}kitab [Direct PDF link]

💡 I will search for the book and download it for you directly if found, or give you manual search links.

⚔️ {botName}
book.url_wait: ⏳ Attempting to download the book from the link...
book.search_results:
📚 *Search results for: {query}* 📚

⚠️ Could not download the file automatically.
🔎 *Suggested Manual Search links:*
book.tip: 📥 *Tip:* If you find a direct link, send it with *.book* or *.kitab* and I will download it for you.

pdf.usage:
📄 *PDF Converter* 📄

1️⃣ *Image to PDF:* 
   Send/Reply to an image with *{prefix}pdf*

2️⃣ *Text to PDF:* 
   Send/Reply to text with *{prefix}pdf*

⚔️ {botName}

wallpaper4k.help:
📌 *4kwallpaper Instructions*:

✅ By category:
• .4kwallpaper popular
• .4kwallpaper featured
• .4kwallpaper random
• .4kwallpaper collection

🔍 Search:
• .4kwallpaper search nature

📥 Download:
• .4kwallpaper dl [URL]
wallpaper4k.error_no_res: ❌ Could not find direct download link.

faceswap.help:
🎭 *Face Swap* 🎭

🔹 *Usage:*
1. Send source image.
2. Reply to it with target image + {prefix}faceswap.

💡 Results are better with clear faces.
faceswap.error_dual: ❌ Please reply to an image with another image to perform face swap.

remini.error_no_api: ❌ Sorry, this feature requires a paid API key currently.

unblur.help: ⚠️ Please reply to an image or provide a valid image URL.

removebg.help: 📷 Please reply with an image and use {prefix}removebg

ai_img_edit.help:
🎨 *AI Image Editor* 🎨

🔹 *Usage:*
1️⃣ Reply to an image:
   {prefix}ai-img-edit make them wear glasses

2️⃣ Or use link:
   {prefix}ai-img-edit [Link] | [Prompt]
ai_img_edit.error_link: ❌ Please provide a valid image link or reply to an image.

colorize.help:
🎨 *AI Image Colorizer*

This feature uses AI to restore and colorize black & white photos.

🧑‍💻 HOW TO USE
1️⃣ Reply to a black & white image
2️⃣ Send the command: {prefix}colorize

deepseek.help:
🔍 Please provide a query for Deepseek.

🔹 *Usage:* {prefix}aicheck [Text to check]
